summary: Tested Public/Guest Estimate Checker flow. All 23 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass for public estimate checker page (accessible without login, vehicle selection, region switching), public result page (driving conditions toggle, sign-in CTAs), login/register returnTo handling, and auto-claim flow after login.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/supported-vehicles returns 200 without auth
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/supported-vehicles returns Mazda CX-5 2022
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/region-profiles returns 200 without auth
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/region-profiles contains US and CA profiles
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/analyze returns 200 with valid file (no auth)
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/analyze returns estimate with guest_token
Backend: Guest estimate has user_id = None
Backend: Guest estimate has correct vehicle info
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/results/{id}?guest_token=xxx returns 200
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/results/{id} returns 404 with invalid guest_token
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/results/{id} returns 422 without guest_token
Backend: GET /api/estimates/public/results/{id} returns estimate, items, summary
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/results/{id}/reanalyze returns 200 with valid guest_token
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/results/{id}/reanalyze returns 404 with invalid guest_token
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/results/{id}/reanalyze updates schedule_code
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/claim/{id} returns 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/claim/{id} claims estimate with auth
Backend: POST /api/estimates/public/claim/{id} returns 404 for already claimed
Backend: Authenticated endpoints still require auth (region-profiles, supported-vehicles, create estimate)
Frontend: Landing page 'Check an Estimate' button navigates to /estimate-checker
Frontend: /estimate-checker accessible without login
Frontend: Public estimate checker has region selector (US/Canada)
Frontend: Region switching changes mileage label (Current Mileage/Current Odometer)
Frontend: Region switching changes placeholder (e.g. 42,000 / e.g. 65,000)
Frontend: Vehicle selection (Make/Model/Year) works correctly
Frontend: Login page handles returnTo query parameter
Frontend: Register page handles returnTo query parameter
Frontend: Login page 'Sign up' link preserves returnTo
Frontend: Register page 'Sign in' link preserves returnTo
Frontend: Logged-in user visiting /login with returnTo redirects to returnTo URL
Frontend: Public result page accessible without login
Frontend: Public result page shows vehicle info, region badge, mileage badge
Frontend: Public result page shows driving conditions toggle (US only)
Frontend: Driving conditions toggle triggers reanalysis
Frontend: Public result page shows 'Sign In to Save' button (disabled when no items selected)
Frontend: Public result page shows CTA banner with 'Create Free Account' and 'Sign In' buttons
Frontend: CTA 'Sign In' button redirects to login with returnTo containing estimate path and guest_token
Frontend: After login with returnTo, estimate is auto-claimed and user redirected to /estimates/:id
Frontend: Toast shows 'Estimate linked to your account' after claim
critical_code_review_comments: Public endpoints correctly implemented without auth dependency
Guest token flow works correctly for estimate creation and retrieval
Claim endpoint correctly requires auth and links estimate to user
Frontend correctly handles returnTo parameter in login/register flows
Auto-claim on login works correctly when user visits public result page
seed_data_creation: Created guest estimate for testing: estimate_id=41aa8d99-c13c-467d-b95b-2d3096266abf (now claimed by test@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public/Guest Estimate Checker flow fully tested. Key features: 1) /estimate-checker page accessible without login, 2) Public endpoints (/api/estimates/public/*) work without auth, 3) Guest estimates have user_id=null and guest_token, 4) Login/Register pages handle returnTo parameter, 5) After login, visiting public result page auto-claims estimate and redirects to /estimates/:id. The test estimate (41aa8d99-c13c-467d-b95b-2d3096266abf) was claimed by test@test.com during testing.

public_endpoints.POST /api/estimates/public/claim/{id}: Requires auth, links estimate to user

frontend_routes./estimate-checker: Public upload page, no auth required
frontend_routes./estimate-checker/:id: Public result page, requires guest_token in URL

returnTo_handling.login_page: Reads returnTo from query params, redirects after login
returnTo_handling.register_page: Reads returnTo from query params, preserves in login link
returnTo_handling.public_route: Redirects logged-in user to returnTo or /dashboard
